tasks.prepare: deno task vendor && deno task compile
tasks.dev: deno task prepare && deno task serve
tasks.tauri:build:mac: deno task prepare && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
tasks.tauri:build:mac:x64: deno task prepare && tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin
tasks.tauri:build:win: deno task prepare && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
